subcodes.title: Material and Spiritual Progress: Words spoken on 1911-11-02 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: How beautiful the weather is today, the sky is clear, the sun shines, and the heart of man is made glad thereby!
subcodes.first_line_orig: جسم انسان در هوای خوش منتعش میشود حیات انسان تجدد می یابد قلب مسرور میشود
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @The Holy Spirit
